     the Fermi energy is     0.5485 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.47554614 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.04980590 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6197.42574023 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -115730.92964764 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   58450.70052927 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2130.59246709 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   53215.01425514 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.61840991 Ry
